name: TopCashback AU
one_liner: Highest-rate cashback portal in AU — top pick alongside ShopBack since Cashrewards closed in 2025.
benefit: Earn cashback at 5,000+ stores including Apple, Booking.com, and Expedia; well-known for high rates (Apple 8%, travel 15%+); cashback withdrawable to bank or gift cards.
signup_bonus: ~$10–20 bonus after first qualifying purchase (check current terms)
referral_note: Get a referral via OzBargain's referral threads/randomiser so both you and the referrer get the bonus.

how_to_join.action: Get a referral link from OzBargain's TopCashback referral thread
Sign up at topcashback.com.au via the referral link
Make a qualifying purchase to unlock the welcome bonus
how_to_join.detail: Always click through from the TopCashback portal; keep the confirmation email as proof.

risks: Cashback can be declined — always shop with tracking enabled and keep order confirmations
High cashback rates on major retailers (e.g. Apple 8%) are promotional and may change
Minimum balance required before withdrawal to bank account
est_value: ~$10–20 one-off bonus + ongoing 2–15% cashback; especially valuable for Apple products and travel
